moments.title: World Cup Quarter-Finals
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 enters the Quarter-Finals stage, with matches today and tomorrow, including England facing Norway on Saturday.

angles.name: England's chances
angles.copy: It's Quarter-Finals day at the World Cup! England take on Norway tomorrow – can the Three Lions roar into the semis?

angles.name: Global Footy Fever
angles.copy: Quarter-Finals action kicks off today at the World Cup! Who are you backing to go all the way?

moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships conclude this weekend, with the Men's Singles Semi-Finals today, including British hopeful Arthur Fery, and the Men's and Ladies' Finals on Saturday and Sunday.

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Centre Court calls! British star Arthur Fery is in the Men's Singles Semi-Finals at Wimbledon today. Can he make it to Sunday's final?

angles.name: Finals Weekend
angles.copy: It's Finals Weekend at Wimbledon! Who are you hoping to see lift the trophies on Centre Court?

moments.title: Wireless Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival, London's major urban music event, runs from today until Sunday at Finsbury Park, featuring top hip hop, grime, R&B, and dance artists.

angles.name: Wireless Weekend
angles.copy: Wireless Festival is ON! Finsbury Park is about to get lit with three days of the biggest names in urban music. Who are you buzzing to see?

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: London, get ready! Wireless Festival kicks off today, bringing the best in hip hop, grime, and R&B to Finsbury Park. Let the good times roll!

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival begins today in Moseley Park, Birmingham, showcasing innovative UK and international acts until Sunday.

angles.name: Birmingham Beats
angles.copy: Moseley Park is alive with the sound of soul! Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival starts today – who's heading to Birmingham for a weekend of incredible music?

angles.name: Groove On
angles.copy: Ready to groove? The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival brings three days of feel-good music to Birmingham starting today!

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13 continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, with the latest drama from the villa keeping viewers hooked.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! Who's coupling up and who's getting pied off tonight? Tune in at 9pm!

angles.name: Islanders Latest
angles.copy: Catch up on all the villa antics! Love Island UK is on every night (except Saturday) on ITV2 and ITVX. What's been your favourite moment this week?

moments.title: Happy 87th to Mavis Staples
moments.blurb: Legendary American gospel and R&B singer Mavis Staples celebrates her 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Soul Legend
angles.copy: Sending huge birthday wishes to the incredible Mavis Staples, who turns 87 today! A true icon of soul and gospel.

angles.name: Staple Singers
angles.copy: From The Staple Singers to her powerful solo career, Mavis Staples has inspired generations. Happy 87th Birthday to a living legend!

moments.title: Happy 72nd to Neil Tennant
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, co-founder and lead singer of the iconic synth-pop duo Pet Shop Boys, celebrates his 72nd birthday today.

angles.name: Pet Shop Boy
angles.copy: Happy 72nd Birthday to Neil Tennant of Pet Shop Boys! What's your favourite track from the synth-pop legends?

angles.name: Synth-Pop Icon
angles.copy: From 'West End Girls' to 'Go West', Neil Tennant has given us countless hits. Wishing him a very Happy 72nd Birthday today!

moments.title: Happy 33rd to Perrie Edwards
moments.blurb: Little Mix star and solo artist Perrie Edwards celebrates her 33rd birthday today.

angles.name: Little Mix Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 33rd Birthday to the amazing Perrie Edwards! What's your top Little Mix or solo track?

angles.name: Pop Powerhouse
angles.copy: From X Factor winner to pop superstar, Perrie Edwards turns 33 today! Celebrate with us by playing your favourite Perrie track!

moments.title: School's Out For Summer!
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK are finishing for the summer holidays this week, marking the start of a long break for students.

angles.name: Freedom!
angles.copy: That's it, school's out! Who's celebrating the start of the summer holidays today? What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Road Trip Ready
angles.copy: The great escape! With school holidays kicking off for many, the roads are set to get busy. Where are you heading for your summer break?

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival
moments.blurb: Kaleidoscope Festival returns to Alexandra Palace Park, London, tomorrow for a day of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Ally Pally Calling
angles.copy: Kaleidoscope Festival takes over Alexandra Palace Park tomorrow! Ready for a day of awesome music and good vibes?

angles.name: London Festival
angles.copy: Looking for plans tomorrow? Kaleidoscope Festival is back at Ally Pally with a fantastic line-up of music and entertainment!

moments.title: Happy 79th to Jeff Hanna
moments.blurb: Jeff Hanna, a founding member of the Grammy-winning country rock band Nitty Gritty Dirt Band, celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Country Rock Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to Jeff Hanna of the Nitty Gritty Dirt Band! What's your favourite track from the country rock pioneers?

moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins next Thursday, July 16th, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, with practice days starting this Sunday.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest
angles.copy: The countdown is on for The Open! Golf's oldest major championship tees off next week at Royal Birkdale. Who are you backing for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Birkdale Bound
angles.copy: Practice days start this weekend for The Open at Royal Birkdale! Get ready for a week of world-class golf action.

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off next Wednesday, July 15th, in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, bringing four days of traditional and contemporary music to Scotland.

angles.name: Island Vibes
angles.copy: Escape to the Outer Hebrides next week for the Hebridean Celtic Festival! Four days of incredible music and culture begin on Wednesday.

angles.name: Scottish Sounds
angles.copy: Get ready for a fantastic celebration of Scottish and international talent! The Hebridean Celtic Festival starts next week!

moments.title: Happy 57th to Richard Marx
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Richard Marx, known for hits like 'Right Here Waiting' and 'Hazard', celebrates his 57th birthday next Thursday.

angles.name: 80s Balladeer
angles.copy: Next Thursday, we're wishing a very Happy 57th Birthday to the legendary Richard Marx! What's your favourite power ballad from him?
